comment.body:
make a plan, 
wait for the target (if it doesn't give it, close the computer)
set the trade,
place the stop-loss (i gave advices how to use it in the first educational post)
and wait... zoom out
5 mins to 10 mins candle (10 is the best),watching indicators, intraday vol.
if it doesn't confirm move, let the stoploss work, or close the trade

Alma, I’m re-reading your skew, RV, IV chat thread and I’m wondering, is all of this based on the options chain IV and calculated RV or is this based on positioning IV?
